1.name: Druidic
1.description: Know the secret Druidic language. Leave hidden messages understood only by druids.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: Prepare WIS mod + Druid level spells per long rest. Cast using Wisdom. Can use a druidic focus.

2.name: Wild Shape
2.description: Action: transform into a beast you've seen with CR up to limits by level. 2 uses per short/long rest. Duration = half Druid level hours.

2.name: Druid Circle
2.description: Choose a subclass circle: Land, Moon, Dreams, Shepherd, Spores, Stars, Wildfire, or others.

18.name: Timeless Body
18.description: Age ten times more slowly than normal for aging effects.

18.name: Beast Spells
18.description: Cast spells while in Wild Shape form, even those with Verbal and Somatic components.

20.name: Archdruid
20.description: Unlimited uses of Wild Shape. Ignore Verbal and Somatic components of druid spells and ignore material components without gold or consumed values.
